content:
# Session 62 (iter-062) — Review Summary

## Metadata
- **Lanes run:** 1 of 2 planned. GR-quot (`Picard/GrassmannianQuot.lean`) delivered. **SNAP
  (`relativeTensorCoequalizerIso`) produced NO committed edits again** — only GrassmannianQuot.lean
  was touched this iter (same as iter-061).
- **Global active sorry: 12 → 13.** GrassmannianQuot **4 → 5** (one new honest scaffold);
  QuotScheme 4 · FBC 4 (parked) · SectionGradedRing 0 · FlatteningStratification 0.
- **HEADLINE: the L3 ATOM `scalarEnd_pullback` — the planner's hard-gate make-or-break — is CLOSED
  axiom-clean**, with helper `unitToPushforward_scalarEnd_comm`. Both `lean_verify` =
  `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}` (re-verified first-hand). `matrixEnd_pullback` (L3(a))
  scaffolded to its naturality-square residual (honest sorry).
- Build green 25s (no OOM). dag gaps=0, unmatched=19. blueprint-doctor **0 findings**.
- sync_leanok ran iter-062 (sha 59b7129, +2/−3, GrassmannianQuot + SectionGradedRing).

## Targets

### `scalarEnd_pullback` (lem:gr_scalarEnd_pullback) — SOLVED, axiom-clean
The single-entry naturality atom: `(pullback p).map (scalarEnd a) ≫ q = q ≫ scalarEnd (p.appTop a)`,
`q = pullbackObjUnitToUnit (toRingCatSheafHom p)`. Closed by transposing under the
pullback–pushforward adjunction:
- `apply (pullbackPushforwardAdjunction p).homEquiv _ _ |>.injective`
- `homEquiv_naturality_left` collapses the LHS transpose; the **RHS** transpose is supplied as an
  explicit TERM `(...).homEquiv_naturality_right (pullbackObjUnitToUnit …) (scalarEnd (p.appTop a))`
  — positional `rw` cannot match the identical-printing `homEquiv` under the `X.Modules` diamond
  (memory `grquot-functor-dropped-termmode`).
- `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction_homEquiv_pullbackObjUnitToUnit` then `exact
  unitToPushforward_scalarEnd_comm p a`.

### `unitToPushforward_scalarEnd_comm` — SOLVED, axiom-clean (new proof-internal helper)
The pushforward-side naturality square `scalarEnd a ≫ unitToPushforwardObjUnit φ =
unitToPushforwardObjUnit φ ≫ (pushforward p).map (scalarEnd (p.appTop a))`.
- **Failed first:** `apply unitHomEquiv.injective; refine sections_ext …; simp only [comp_apply…]`.
  Every comp-apply spelling missed — `ModuleCat.hom_comp`, `CategoryTheory.comp_apply`,
  `ConcreteCategory.comp_apply`, `DFunLike.coe (ConcreteCategory.hom (f≫g))` — because the value-level
  ModuleCat diamond never exposes a `f ≫ g` head (the unfolded `unitHomEquiv (f≫p)` is
  `sectionsMap p (unitHomEquiv f)`). Also hit `Scheme.{u}` → had to fix to `Scheme.{0}` (universe-0
  trap, attempts at lines 105–107) and an `OfNat 1` synth failure on the pushforward carrier.
- **BREAKTHROUGH:** `change` the goal directly into the fully **nested-application** form
  `(unitToPushforwardObjUnit φ).val.app Y ((scalarEnd a).val.app Y (1 : S.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj Y)) =
  ((pushforward p).map (scalarEnd (p.appTop a))).val.app Y ((unitToPushforwardObjUnit φ).val.app Y
  (1 : S.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj Y))`. Dropping the comp heads makes both sides defeq-navigable; the
  `(1 : S.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj Y)` ascription is REQUIRED.
- **Finish:** `scalarEnd_val_app_one` + `unitToPushforwardObjUnit_val_app_apply` + `map_one` +
  `pushforward_map_app_apply'` (rfl) reduce both sides; then `ConcreteCategory.congr_hom` of
  `(toRingCatSheafHom p).hom.naturality (homOfLE le_top).op a` identifies the restriction-then-comorphism
  composites and closes.

### `matrixEnd_pullback` (lem:gr_matrixEnd_pullback) — PARTIAL, honest scaffold
`(pullback p).map (matrixEnd M) = Q.hom ≫ matrixEnd (p.appTop.mapMatrix M) ≫ Q.inv`,
`Q = pullbackFreeIso p (Fin d)`. Reduced to the naturality-square form:
`rw [← Category.assoc, Iso.eq_comp_inv, matrixEnd]`. (`Iso.eq_comp_inv` needs the `← Category.assoc`
first; `Functor.map_comp` does NOT fire positionally under the functor diamond.) **Residual (sorry,
documented):** distribute `(pullback p)` over the unfolded biproduct presentation (term-mode
`(pullback p).map_comp`), then reduce the pulled-back `biproduct.matrix (scalarEnd ∘ M)` per-entry to
`scalarEnd_pullback (M p q)` + cofan extensionality.

### `bundleTransition_cocycle` (C2) — BLOCKED (unchanged, honest sorry)
Not attacked directly — the lane attacked the atom first per plan. Cascades once (a) `matrixEnd_pullback`,
(b) `baseChange_bridge`, and the pure-assembly `bundleTransition_cocycle_transport` land. Riders
`universalQuotient`/`tautologicalQuotient`/`represents` ride on C2.

## Key findings / patterns
- **`change`-to-nested-application is the lever for the value-level ModuleCat diamond.** When every
  `comp_apply` spelling fails to find a `f ≫ g` head (the diamond hides it), bypass entirely by
  `change`-ing the whole goal into the nested `app Y (app Y (1 : <explicit carrier>))` form. The
  numeral needs an explicit carrier ascription. This is the reusable unlock that closed the atom.
- **Universe-0 trap:** `scalarEnd`/`pullback` infrastructure here is `Scheme.{0}`-specific; a
  `Scheme.{u}` signature breaks `unitHomEquiv`/`sectionsMap` `DFunLike.coe` universe unification.
- **Diamond-blocked adjunction `rw` → explicit term.** `homEquiv_naturality_right` must be supplied as a
  fully-applied term (both morphisms named) — confirms the standing `grquot-functor-dropped-termmode`
  discipline now also covers `Adjunction.homEquiv` naturality.

## Subagent reports (full text auto-archived to logs/iter-062/)
- **lean-auditor iter062** (`task_results/lean-auditor-iter062.md`): 0 must-fix / **1 major** / 0 minor.
  All new code genuine (no laundering, no `opaque`/`axiom`/`native_decide`), all 5 sorries honest +
  documented. Major = **stale section NOTE at GrassmannianQuot.lean:316–322** (the `glue` block claims
  body+cocycle-hyps "still to be filled" — DONE since iter-056 — and describes the abandoned
  `overRestrictPullbackIso`/`existsUnique_gluing'` path, not the committed descent-equalizer). Review
  cannot edit `.lean` → recs §1. (This is the same stale-NOTE region flagged iter-061 at L319–323.)
- **lvb-checker grquot-iter062** (`task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-grquot-iter062.md`): 0 must-fix
  / 0 major / **2 minor**. File faithful; all `\lean{}` pins resolve; `matrixEnd_pullback` correctly
  carries statement-only `\leanok` (no proof-block leanok). Minors → recs §2/§3.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- **NONE.** Considered adding a proof-block `\leanok` to `lem:gr_scalarEnd_pullback` (lvb minor #1
  flagged its absence as a "sync gap"). **Declined after first-hand check:** the chapter's own closed,
  axiom-clean L1/C1 proofs (`bundleTransition_self` proof @953, `bundleTransition_cocycle_matrix` proof
  @995) likewise carry NO proof-block `\leanok` — sync omits proof-block leanok for this chapter as a
  matter of course. The absence on `scalarEnd_pullback` matches the established pattern; it is NOT an
  anomaly, so no override is warranted (would diverge from the chapter). No `\mathlibok` (no new
  Mathlib-backed decls), no `\lean{}` renames (prover kept planned names), no stale `\notready`.

## Notes (LOW)
- lvb minor #2: `lem:gr_scalarEnd_pullback`'s `\uses` credits `lem:gr_pullbackFreeIso` but the Lean
  proof uses the lower-level `pullbackObjUnitToUnit` directly — harmless DAG overstatement.
